use_cases: Displaying achievement badges in gamification systems
Creating verification stamps for certification platforms
Showing level indicators with metallic gradients (bronze/silver/gold/platinum)
Adding decorative award elements to user profiles or completion screens
ai_summary: A versatile awards and stamp component with multiple variants (stamp, award, certificate, badge, sticker, id-card) supporting bronze/silver/gold/platinum levels. Renders serrated stamp shapes using SVG path generation with metallic gradient styling. Ideal for displaying achievements, certifications, and recognition elements in SaaS platforms, educational systems, or gamified applications.
